name: Worker (Media Maintenance)
description: Dedicated worker for slow bulk media-maintenance jobs — archive relocate/restore over S3/MinIO plus durable signal-scan reprobe — isolated from generation so long uploads/sweeps don't eat its slots

settings.description: Max concurrent jobs (1 avoids parallel uploads/probe fetches saturating the link)
Job timeout in seconds (the job self-re-enqueues ~40 min in, well before this)
